publications.ref: Doll S, Dreßen M, Geyer PE, Itzhak DN, Braun C, Doppler SA, Meier F, Deutsch MA, Lahm H, Lange R, Krane M, Mann M. Region and cell-type resolved quantitative proteomic map of the human heart. Nat Commun. 2017 8(1):1469

Characteristics[Organism].evidence: Region and cell-type resolved quantitative proteomic map of the human heart

Characteristics[OrganismPart].evidence: we determine the healthy human heart proteome by measuring 16 anatomical regions

Characteristics[CellType].evidence: Analysis of cardiac fibroblasts identifies cellular receptors as potential cell surface markers

Characteristics[MaterialType].evidence: From low microgram sample amounts, we quantify over 10,700 proteins in this high dynamic range tissue

Comment[AcquisitionMethod].evidence: measuring 16 anatomical regions and three major cardiac cell types by high-resolution mass spectrometry-based proteomics

Characteristics[Label].reasoning: 論文では標識法について明記されていないが、心臓組織の16領域と3つの細胞型の定量プロテオーム解析という内容から、label-freeアプローチの可能性が高い
Characteristics[Label].needs: Methods section for labeling strategy confirmation

STEP1_OVERVIEW.summary: 正常なヒト心臓の16の解剖学的領域と3つの主要心筋細胞型（心筋線維芽細胞を含む）を対象とした高解像度質量分析ベースのプロテオミクス研究。10,700以上のタンパク質を定量化し、細胞あたりのコピー数とオルガネラ割り当てを組み合わせて細胞レベルでの心臓プロテオームモデルを構築。標識法については未確定だが、実験設計上label-freeの可能性が高い。

Characteristics[CleavageAgent].evidence: overnight digestion by adding Lys-C and trypsin in a 1:50 ratio... further digested for 3 h with Lys-C and trypsin (1:100 ratio)

Characteristics[ReductionReagent].evidence: resupended in 500 µl of SDC reduction and alkylation buffer

Characteristics[AlkylationReagent].evidence: resupended in 500 µl of SDC reduction and alkylation buffer

Characteristics[Label].evidence: Label-free quantification was performed with the MaxLFQ algorithm using a minimum ratio count of 1

Characteristics[Modification].1.evidence: N-terminal acetylation and methionine oxidations as variable modifications

Characteristics[Modification].2.evidence: N-terminal acetylation and methionine oxidations as variable modifications

Comment[FractionationMethod].evidence: About 30 µg of peptides of each sample were further fractionated into 54 fractions and concatenated into 8 fractions by high-pH reversed-phase fractionation using the recently described "loss-less" nano-fractionator

Comment[NumberOfFractions].evidence: fractionated into 54 fractions and concatenated into 8 fractions

Comment[Separation].evidence: Nanoflow LC–MS/MS analysis... coupled to an EASYnLC 1200 ultra-high-pressure system

Characteristics[CleavageAgent].reasoning: テキストにはtrypsinとLys-Cの両方が明記されているため、併用プロトコルの可能性がある
Characteristics[CleavageAgent].needs: 標準的なSDRF記載方式での酵素併用の表記方法確認

STEP2_SAMPLE_PREP.summary: サンプル調製では、SDC緩衝液での還元アルキル化後、Lys-CとTrypsinによる段階的消化を実施。Label-free定量でCarbamidomethyl（固定修飾）、Oxidation・Acetyl（可変修飾）を設定。高pH逆相分画で54フラクションを8フラクションに統合し、nanoLC-MS/MSで分析。酵素併用の記載方法のみ要確認。

Comment[Instrument].evidence: quadrupole Orbitrap mass spectrometer (Q Exactive HF, Thermo Fisher Scientific, Rockford, IL, USA)

Comment[FragmentationMethod].evidence: Following higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD) with a normalized collision energy (NCE) of 27%

Comment[AcquisitionMethod].evidence: The mass spectrometer was operated in "top-15" data-dependent mode

Comment[IonizationType].evidence: coupled to an EASYnLC 1200 ultra-high-pressure system (Thermo Fisher Scientific) via a nano-electrospray ion source

Comment[MS2MassAnalyzer].evidence: MS/MS spectra were collected in the Orbitrap (15,000 resolution)

Comment[CollisionEnergy].evidence: Following higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD) with a normalized collision energy (NCE) of 27%

Comment[PrecursorMassTolerance].evidence: The maximum mass tolerance for precursor and fragment ions was 4.5 ppm and 20 ppm, respectively

Comment[FragmentMassTolerance].evidence: The maximum mass tolerance for precursor and fragment ions was 4.5 ppm and 20 ppm, respectively

Comment[NumberOfMissedCleavages].evidence: a maximum of two missed cleavages were allowed in the database search

Comment[GradientTime].evidence: Peptides were separated using a linear gradient from 2 to 20% B in 55 min and stepped up to 40% in 40 min followed by a 5 min wash at 98% B at 350 nl per min... The total duration of the run was 100 min

Comment[FlowRateChromatogram].evidence: followed by a 5 min wash at 98% B at 350 nl per min

STEP3_MS_SETTINGS.summary: 質量分析装置と設定パラメータが完全に確定。Q Exactive HFを使用し、HCD断片化（NCE 27%）、データ依存取得モード、nanoESIイオン化、Orbitrap MS2分析器を使用。質量許容誤差はMS1: 4.5 ppm、MS2: 20 ppm、最大ミスクリベージ数2、グラデーション時間100分、流速350 nl/minで実施。全ての主要パラメータが論文に明記されており、推論の余地はない。

Comment[FractionIdentifier].per_file: fractionated samples concatenated from 54 to 8 fractions
Comment[FractionIdentifier].evidence: About 30 µg of peptides of each sample were further fractionated into 54 fractions and concatenated into 8 fractions by high-pH reversed-phase fractionation

Characteristics[BiologicalReplicate].per_file: 3 biological replicates per heart region, extracted from filename patterns like RA3, RA4, RA8
Characteristics[BiologicalReplicate].evidence: 16 healthy heart regions from three adult male individuals... identifiable from filename patterns showing region codes followed by numbers 3, 4, or 8

Characteristics[NumberOfBiologicalReplic.evidence: 16 healthy heart regions from three adult male individuals

Characteristics[NumberOfSamples].evidence: In total, 16 healthy heart regions from three adult male individuals... CFs, AFs, ECs, and SMCs were processed similarly

FactorValue[CellPart].per_file: heart anatomical regions and cell types extracted from filename tokens
FactorValue[CellPart].evidence: 16 heart regions included four main vessels (aorta (Ao), pulmonary artery (PA), vena cava inferior (IVC), and pulmonary vein (PVe)), four heart cavities (right atrium (RA), left atrium (LA), right ventricle (RV), and left ventricle (LV)), four heart valves... plus cell types AFcells, CD31ECcells, KFcells, SmoothP1acells

Characteristics[NumberOfTechnicalReplica.reasoning: Multiple fraction files exist per sample (frac1-frac8), but unclear if these represent technical replicates or fractionation strategy
Characteristics[NumberOfTechnicalReplica.needs: clarification whether fractions constitute technical replicates or are part of sample preparation workflow

FactorValue[Compound].reasoning: Some AF cell files contain 'DMSO' token (e.g., DMSO_A3602-1.raw), suggesting possible compound treatment
FactorValue[Compound].needs: verification if DMSO represents actual treatment or just solvent control

STEP4_RAW_FILES.summary: 実験デザインが明確化：16心臓領域×3個体の生物学的3連でフラクション化戦略を採用。ファイル名から心臓解剖学的部位（RA、LA、RV、LV等）と細胞種（AFcells、CD31ECcells等）、生物学的レプリケート（3、4、8）が特定可能。54フラクションを8フラクションに統合する分画法を使用。一部AFサンプルでDMSO処理の可能性があるが詳細未確定。テクニカルレプリケートの定義要確認。
